name: erpnext_accounting
description: Comprehensive accounting and financial management app.
context: The ERPNext Accounting app provides a full suite of tools to manage accounts, journal entries, general ledger entries, cost centers, fiscal years, and currencies. It models the core accounting functionality from ERPNext.

account.description: Chart of Accounts entry. Represents a node in the account tree (Asset, Liability, Equity, Income, Expense).

company.description: Represents the legal entity for which accounts are maintained.

cost_center.description: Cost Center for tracking income and expenses for specific business units or projects.

gl_entry.description: General Ledger Entry. Represents a single debit or credit line in the accounting ledger. Typically created automatically when submitting a Journal Entry.

journal_entry.description: A document to record financial transactions, containing multiple journal entry accounts.

journal_entry_account.description: A line item within a Journal Entry representing a specific debit or credit to an Account.
